party.name: Party Time
party.description: Fun, laughs, and a bit of chaos — perfect for any group.

food.name: Food
food.description: Tasty topics — say the wrong thing and you're toast.

celebrities.name: Celebrities
celebrities.description: Famous names from film, music and sport. Pretend you know them.

hobbies.name: Hobbies
hobbies.description: Passions and pastimes — is your hobby the imposter?

family.name: Family
family.description: You know family best — but can they catch you bluffing?

brands.name: Brands
brands.description: Familiar names and everyday things — recognise them or fake it.

places.name: Places
places.description: Countries, cities, monuments — pretend you've been there.

animals.name: Animals
animals.description: From pets to wild beasts — can you blend in with the herd?

sports.name: Sports
sports.description: Whether you're a fan or faking it — keep a straight face.

films.name: Films
films.description: Classics and blockbusters — can you bluff your way through movie night?

music.name: Music
music.description: Genres, festivals, hits — can you find the right note?

jobs.name: Jobs
jobs.description: What do people do all day? Play your part well.

technology.name: Technology
technology.description: Apps, gadgets and everything that beeps — pretend you get it.

tvshows.name: TV Shows
tvshows.description: Series everyone's binged — can you sniff out the imposter?

videogames.name: Videogames
videogames.description: Pixels and controllers — pretend you've played them all.

superheroes.name: Superheroes
superheroes.description: Capes and powers — can you suit up without slipping?

mythical.name: Myths & Magic
mythical.description: Dragons, witches, and creatures from legend — bluff in a fantasy realm.

buildings.name: Buildings
buildings.description: Places we visit and structures we know — recognise the venue or fake it.

spicy.name: Spicy
spicy.description: Bold and a little risky — perfect for tension and laughs.
